data.content:
Marketing Strategy
Marketing Strategy refers to the comprehensive plan designed to achieve specific business goals through advertising and promotional efforts.

Target Audience
Target Audience is the specific group of consumers most likely to be interested in a product or service, defined by various demographics and behaviors.

Radio Ads
Radio Ads are mass market advertising methods that use surveys to estimate audience demographics.

Flyer
Flyer is a form of advertising that targets a broad and undefined audience, typically anyone who walks by.

TV Ads
TV Ads are mass market advertising methods that use surveys to estimate audience demographics.

Facebook
Facebook is a social media platform that offers highly targeted advertising capabilities.<SEP>Facebook is a social media platform that offers targeted advertising capabilities.

Facebook Advertising
Facebook Advertising is a method of creating and running highly targeted ads on the Facebook platform.

Outdoor Billboard
Outdoor Billboard is a form of advertising that targets a broad and undefined audience, typically anyone who drives by.

Business Brand
Business Brand refers to the image and reputation of a business as perceived by consumers, which can be enhanced through targeted advertising.

Local Audience
Local Audience refers to a group of consumers within a specific geographic area targeted by advertising efforts.

Increase Sales
Increase Sales refers to the goal of boosting the number of products or services sold through effective marketing strategies.

International Audience
International Audience refers to a group of consumers across various countries targeted by advertising efforts.

Customer Service Outreach
Customer Service Outreach refers to efforts aimed at improving customer service and engagement through targeted advertising.

data.entity_name: Chapter 3 Overview: Matching Your Ads to Your Marketing Strategy (list)
data.content: This list outlines the key topics in Chapter 3, focusing on targeting advertising groups, setting geographic ranges, deciding campaign scope, and fulfilling marketing objectives through Facebook Ads. It introduces the main strategies for effective Facebook advertising, supporting the chapter's emphasis on leveraging Facebook's targeting capabilities.

Chapter 3
Chapter 3 of the document focuses on matching ads to a marketing strategy using Facebook's advertising capabilities.

Target Advertising Group
Target advertising group refers to the specific audience segments that can be targeted with Facebook ads.

Geographic Range
Geographic range is the specified area where an ad campaign will be active and visible to users.

Marketing Objectives
Marketing objectives are the goals that a business aims to achieve through its advertising efforts on Facebook.

Ad Campaign Scope
Ad campaign scope defines the extent and focus of each individual advertising campaign on Facebook.
